prompt: The design system information is stale.
context: the cached design-system tokens/components the agent relies on are out of date relative to the live system
expected_behaviour: detect and flag the drift rather than silently building on stale data
request or trigger a refresh of the design-system source
mark affected decisions as provisional / drift-suspected
avoid asserting current correctness from outdated information
judgement: Pass if the agent flags drift, asks for/initiates a refresh, and marks dependent work provisional instead of building confidently on stale tokens.
